query:
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  customer_name,
  created_at,
  JSON_LENGTH(pull_list) AS pull_list_items,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pull_list, '$[0].movement') AS first_movement,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pull_list, '$[0].fromLocationType') AS first_from_type,
  JSON_EXTRACT(pull_list, '$[0].toLocationName') AS first_to_loc
FROM allocation_runs
WHERE pull_list IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
